title: Rotate PDF
metaDescription: Rotate PDF pages. Turn pages 90, 180, or 270 degrees.
description:
Rotate PDF turns pages in your document by 90, 180, or 270 degrees. Fix incorrectly oriented scans, rotate landscape pages, or adjust page orientation for viewing.

Rotate all pages uniformly or select specific pages to rotate individually. The tool preserves all content and formatting.

All processing happens in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select.

howToUse.title: Select Rotation
howToUse.description: Choose rotation angle and which pages to rotate.

howToUse.title: Rotate and Download
howToUse.description: Click Rotate to apply changes and download.

useCases.title: Landscape Pages
useCases.description: Rotate landscape pages for proper viewing.

useCases.title: Mixed Orientation
useCases.description: Standardize page orientation in mixed documents.

faq.question: Can I rotate different pages differently?
faq.answer: Yes, you can apply different rotations to different pages.

faq.question: Does rotation affect print quality?
faq.answer: No, rotation preserves all content quality.

faq.question: Can I rotate by custom angles?
